description: Product Description Elevate Your Reading Experience with FL-41 Luxury Acetate Frames Your portable 'dark room' Discover the perfect blend of style and functionality with our FL-41 Reading Glasses. Featuring a luxurious acetate frame, these glasses offer both sophistication and comfort. The FL-41 tint is specially designed to address light sensitivity, making reading a more enjoyable experience. Whether you're curling up with a good book or working on your computer, these glasses provide the visual support you need with a touch of elegance. See the Quality - Feel the Difference BENEFITS OF FL-41 Reduce light sensitivity and photophobia Help relieve migraine and headache symptoms triggered by fluorescent or harsh lighting Minimize eye strain from digital screens Improve comfort in environments with glare (e.g., offices, driving, bright indoor spaces) Can enhance contrast, making vision feel more relaxed and clear BENEFITS OF OUR RESIN LENSES Lightweight – About half the weight of traditional glass lenses, making them comfortable for extended wear. Excellent optical clarity – High-quality vision with very low distortion, often considered superior to polycarbonate. Good scratch resistance – More resistant to scratches than polycarbonate Quality lasting tint – Holds tint more consistently and longer than many other lens materials. ABOUT OUR ACETATE FRAMES Durable and long-lasting compared to cheaper plastics Lightweight for comfortable all-day wear Hypoallergenic (safer for sensitive skin) Rich, vibrant colors that won’t fade easily THE REMEDYLENS DIFFERENCE Sustainable elegance – Thoughtful materials ensure your choice feels as good as it looks. Exclusivity – Our collections are produced in limited quantities, and new models added frequently Personal touch – We take the time to know our customers and provide service that feels genuine.
